title: Notifications - Low battery after unplugging the power cable
scenario: Verify that after unplugging the power cable on a device with low battery (below 5%), the charging notification changes to a low battery notification.
steps: Ensure the device battery is below 5%.
Plug the device into a power source.
Observe the notification displayed on the app.
Unplug the power cable from the device.
Observe the notification displayed on the app after unplugging.
expected: When the device is plugged in, the app shows a charging notification. After unplugging, the notification changes to a low battery notification.
